query:
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue,
  (SELECT name FROM customers WHERE externalId = s.customerExternalId) as customerName
FROM services s
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost > 0
  AND serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 15;
